changes: Rolled back all strip-blob logic from p1/p2 (too aggressive — killed freshly-remapped media). v6.0.2 clean base + 2 fixes: (1) regular kpak remap now also handles data: URLs (was only blob:), (2) audio restore now explicitly restores x/y/w/h/flipH/flipV from saved manifest instead of relying on addAudioItem defaults.
